name: Caribbean Guisado
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Chayote Squash, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large roasting pan or casserole dish.
3. Place in oven and cook, uncovered, for 4 hours. The pumpkin, chayote and tomatoes will cook down to a thick sauce. Stir every 30 minutes.
4. Add more stock if necessary.
5. Serve hot.
